subcodes.first_line: In this holy Cause the question of orphans hath the utmost importance. The greatest consideration must be shown towards orphans
subcodes.first_line_orig: در اين امر مبارک مسئله ايتام بسيار اهميّت دارد ايتام را بايد نهايت نوازش نمود
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
